<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_mission/styles.css" /><infobox theme="mission-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{{name}}}'''{{#if: {{{type_name|}}} | <br/><span style="font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal; opacity: 0.85;">{{{type_name}}}</span>}}</format>
    </title>
    <image source="icon">
        <format>[[File:{{{icon}}}|center|alt=Icon of {{{name}}}]]</format>
    </image>
    <panel>
        <data source="mission_type">
            <label>Type</label>
            <format><code>{{{mission_type}}}</code></format>
        </data>
        <data source="min_level">
            <label>Min Level</label>
            <format>{{{min_level}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="min_intensity">
            <label>Min Intensity</label>
            <format>{{{min_intensity}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="extract_at_end">
            <label>Extract</label>
            <format>{{{extract_at_end}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="selectable">
            <label>Selectable</label>
            <format>{{{selectable}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="boss">
            <label>Boss</label>
            <format>[[{{{boss}}}]]</format>
        </data>
        <data source="flags">
            <label>Flags</label>
            <format>{{{flags}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="color">
            <label>Color</label>
            <format><span style="display:inline-block;width:14px;height:14px;background:{{{color}}};border:1px solid #444;vertical-align:middle;"></span> <code>{{{color}}}</code></format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>API Name</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
This template displays a mission in a Portable Infobox.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox mission
|name = Display name (e.g. "Cleanup Detail")
|api_name = Internal MissionName (e.g. "cleanup_detail")
|icon = Icon filename
|mission_type = MissionType enum (e.g. "CleanupDetail")
|type_name = TypeName label (e.g. "Property Reclamation")
|color = Hex color (e.g. "#FF00A4")
|min_level = Minimum player level
|min_intensity = Minimum intensity tier
|extract_at_end = Yes | No
|selectable = Yes | No
|flags = Comma-separated flag labels
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
